articles.title: Real-Time vs Near-Real-Time: What 'Live Data' Actually Means in 2026
articles.excerpt: 'Live data' doesn't mean the same thing everywhere. WebSocket streams update in milliseconds. API polling takes seconds. Worker caches add minutes. Understanding the tradeoffs between true real-time and near-real-time determines whether your dashboard is useful or just flashy.
articles.author: Signal

articles.title: Your Browser Extensions Are Watching You: The Hidden Cost of Free Add-Ons
articles.excerpt: Browser extensions have become a privacy threat vector. Discover why free add-ons monitor your behavior, how they monetize your data, and what you can do about it.
articles.author: zer0day
